text.content:
Injuries • Lightning • Fried Fringe

Injury Card

Fried Fringe

A sudden burst of lightning has singed your hair and clothes. Your fringe now crackles with energy, making you slightly jittery. It's a shocking fashion statement!

Crackling Shock
Treatment

Trimming the fried ends may help minimize static buildup and reduce your urge to reach out and touch someone.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Lightning

  • odds: 20

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Fried Fringe

  • imagetitle: Crackling Shock

  • image: icons/magic/lightning/bolt-strike-forked-blue.webp

  • description: A sudden burst of lightning has singed your hair and clothes. Your fringe now crackles with energy, making you slightly jittery. It's a shocking fashion statement!

  • treatment: Trimming the fried ends may help minimize static buildup and reduce your urge to reach out and touch someone.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Lightning Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Lightning • Shocking Bad Hair Day

Injury Card

Shocking Bad Hair Day

Your hair stands on end like you've been electrified. It's not just a fashion statement; the static energy around you is causing mild shocks to anyone who gets too close, making teamwork a bit electrifying.

Static Overload
Treatment

Ground yourself by meditating on a grassy field for an hour.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Lightning

  • odds: 5

  • treatment: Ground yourself by meditating on a grassy field for an hour.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 6

  • duration: 120

  • action: Apply the Lightning Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Lightning • Shockwave Symphony

Injury Card

Shockwave Symphony

Your encounter with a powerful lightning strike leaves you resonating with a shockwave symphony. Vibrations ripple through you, causing sporadic involuntary movements.

Electric Harmony
Treatment

Resting in a calm environment and gentle grounding exercises can help silence the electric symphony playing in your muscles.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 200

  • Status Effect: Unconscious

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Lightning • The Lightning Conductor

Injury Card

The Lightning Conductor

Your body has become a lightning rod, attracting bolts from the sky and nearby magic. While it's great for parties, it's not so fun when you're the only one glowing in the dark during stealth missions.

Living Conduit
Treatment

Sit out in a storm for an hour and let it all discharge.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Lightning

  • odds: 3

  • foldername: Injuries

  • description: Your body has become a lightning rod, attracting bolts from the sky and nearby magic. While it's great for parties, it's not so fun when you're the only one glowing in the dark during stealth missions.

  • treatment: Sit out in a storm for an hour and let it all discharge.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 10

  • duration: 0

  • action: Apply the Lightning Injury

  • statuseffect: Stunned

Injuries • Lightning • Thunderous Tingle

Injury Card

Thunderous Tingle

As lightning courses through your veins, you experience a thunderous tingle that leaves you feeling both exhilarated and slightly jittery. Beware of unexpected shivers!

Rumbling Shiver
Treatment

Taking shelter from any stormy weather and avoiding static-inducing fabrics can help reduce the lingering tingling sensation.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 150

  • Status Effect: Paralyzed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Lightning • Thunderous Tinnitus

Injury Card

Thunderous Tinnitus

During the last battle, a lightning strike has left you with the constant sound of thunder in your ears. The effect is worse during silences, making stealth a bit tricky while keeping you constantly on edge.

Ear Ringing
Treatment

Have a bard play soothing music for an evening.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Lightning • Zap Zap Fingers

Injury Card

Zap Zap Fingers

You touched something electrifying and now your fingers feel tingly. Whenever you try to grab something, a small spark jumps. Sometimes it helps light candles, but other times it just zaps you.

Electric Jolt
Treatment

Rest and avoid touching anything metal for a day.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Lightning • Zapped Zest

Injury Card

Zapped Zest

After being zapped by lightning, you feel electrifyingly energized! But be careful, that extra zest might make you act impulsively for a while.

Sparkling Sizzle
Treatment

Resting and avoiding loud noises can help calm your overexcited nerves.

Details

  • Category: Lightning

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Stunned
